productDisplayName: Puma Men Drift Cat III NM Black Sports Shoes
description: These stylish Drift cat III NM shoes from puma that have a motorsport friendly design are great for urban wear. These shoes are suitable for regular wear as their attractive low-profile design looks great when teamed with jeans and tees for a casual look.UpperSynthetic leather uppers for durability and protectionAssymetric lacing system for a snug FitLightly padded collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for extra comfortBrand name embossed on the tongue, stylized cat logo printed on the side and cat logo on the heel counterFormstripe appliqued on the lateral side Metal mesh inserts on the sides of the heel for greater stabilityMidsoleEco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning Phylon midsole for greater lightweight comfortOutsoleNon-slip rubber outsole in a tyre tread pattern for greater tractionFlex grooves for greater flexibility of the feetSole extending to heel counter for greater protection of the heel
